name: Pumpkin Muffins#3
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Grease a muffin tin with Pam cooking spray.
3. Divide the batter equally among the muffin cups.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 25 minutes.
5. Makes 12 muffins.
Each serving of six (6) muffins equals:
- 1 Bread Exchange
- 1 Fruit Exchange
- 1 Milk Exchange
- 1 Protein Exchange
- 1 1/2 Vegetable Exchanges
This is a no fat recipe!
You may substitute Egg Beaters for the eggs and Equal for the Sweet & Low.
These freeze well.
